goal: exists(k0: MulAction[G, M]) { MulAction.new[G, M](r.act) = Option.some(k0) }

p.c: function[T0: Group, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> T1) { not MulAction.constraint[T0, T1](x0) or exists(k0: MulAction[T0, T1]) { MulAction.new[T0, T1](x0) = Option.some[MulAction[T0, T1]](k0) } }[G, M](r.act)

goal: action_identity_constraint[G, M](r.act) = forall(x0: M) { r.act(G.1, x0) = x0 }

p.c: function[T0: Group, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T1) { x0(x1, x0(x2, x3)) = x0(x1 * x2, x3) } = action_mul_constraint[T0, T1](x0) }[G, M](r.act)

goal: action_is_add_hom[G, M](r.act) = forall(x0: G) { is_add_group_hom[M, M](function(x1: M) { r.act(x0, x1) }) }

goal: is_add_group_hom[M, M](f) = forall(x0: M, x1: M) { f(x0 + x1) = f(x0) + f(x1) }

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x2) != x0(x1) or x2 = x1 } = is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) }[M, M](add_rep_action_map[G, M](r, g))
